real_estate_laws.title: Real Estate Laws in Turkey
real_estate_laws.description: In Mawtney Real Estate, we are committed to following the latest legal changes continuously
paragraphs: Real estate laws in Turkey are known for their flexibility and continuous development in line with the growth of the property market and the increasing interest of foreign investors. The Turkish government regularly updates regulations to support investment and provide a transparent and secure environment for property buyers.

These updates may include changes to the minimum investment amount required for obtaining Turkish citizenship, as well as adjustments related to property residency conditions and legal procedures involved in purchasing real estate. Understanding these updates is an important step for anyone considering property investment in Turkey.

Having access to accurate and up-to-date information allows investors to make well-informed decisions and build a clear investment strategy that aligns with their goals, whether for living, long-term investment, or obtaining Turkish citizenship.

At Mawtney Real Estate, we continuously monitor the latest legal updates and provide our clients with trusted consultations to help them understand the market and its regulations, ensuring a safe buying experience and a successful investment in Turkey.
